transcript: Yeah, we got, um... Raymond in Golden, next on KBIG 1090. Hi, Raymond.
[unclear] Uh, gentlemen... Gentleman calling, uhhh... was, uh... traveling through the Bow Mar county recently, and I... saw Rich Karlis, and...
We're having a hard time hearing you, Ray, uh... Raymond.
Yeah, now we can. You're off the speaker, go ahead.
Okay, as I was, uh... sayin' to you gentlemen, I was driving through, uh, uh... the Bow Mar county a few days ago, and saw, uh, uh... [pitch begins to lower] Rich Karlis, down there.
[pitch continues to lower] And I asked him a couple questions about, uh... about some of the, the punting team this year, and how he felt about it, and, uh... if everything was gonna work out...
He sounds like Lurch! You sound like Lurch, Raymond.
Well... whatever. Thanks for your call, we just couldn't understand--
